'''√l-th-zh''' ('''lathazha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cudgel|cudgel]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-th-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cudgel|cudgel]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √l-th-zh
|-
! Lemma
| lathazha
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || lathazhithi || lathazhiji || lathazhishi || lathazhi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || lathazhuthuth || lathazhujuj || lathazhushush || lathazh
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || lathazhuthu || lathazhuju || lathazhushu || lathazhu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || lathazhufuth || lathazhufuj || lathazhufush || lathazhuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || lathazhethe || lathazheje || lathazheshe || lathazhe
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || lathazhothoth || lathazhojoj || lathazhoshosh || lathazh
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || lathazhotho || lathazhojo || lathazhosho || lathazho
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || lathazhofoth || lathazhofoj || lathazhofosh || lathazhof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || lathazhïf || lathazhïf || lathazhïf || lathazhïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || lathazhïfïf || lathazhïfïf || lathazhïfïf || lathazhïfïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || lathazhïf || lathazhïf || lathazhïf || lathazhïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || lathazhïf || lathazhïf || lathazhïf || lathazhïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || lathazhæthæ || lathazhæjæ || lathazhæshæ || lathazhæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || lathazhathath || lathazhajaj || lathazhashash || lathazh
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || lathazhatha || lathazhaja || lathazhasha || lathazha
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || lathazhafath || lathazhafaj || lathazhafash || lathazhaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || lathazhasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || golathazhasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || gokilathazhasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || lathazhnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || golathazhnknüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokilathazhnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || lathazhshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || golathazhnkshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokilathazhshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || lathazhroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || golathazhnkroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokilathazhroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || lathazhmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || golathazhnkmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokilathazhmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || lathazhsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || golathazhnksherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokilathazhsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || lathazhngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || golathazhnkngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokilathazhngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || lathazhyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || golathazhnkyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokilathazhyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || lathazhyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || golathazhnkyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokilathazhyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || lathazhnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || golathazhnknüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokilathazhnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || lathazhnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || golathazhnknüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokilathazhnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || lathazhnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || golathazhnknümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokilathazhnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || lathazhshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || golathazhnkshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokilathazhshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || lathazhshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || golathazhnkshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokilathazhshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || lathazhshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || golathazhnkshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokilathazhshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || lathazhronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || golathazhnkronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokilathazhronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || lathazhroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || golathazhnkroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokilathazhroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || lathazhromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || golathazhnkromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokilathazhromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || lathazhmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || golathazhnkmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokilathazhmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || lathazhmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || golathazhnkmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokilathazhmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || lathazhmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || golathazhnkmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokilathazhmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || lathazh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || læthæzh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || holathazh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || holæthæzh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || hoholathazh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || hoholæthæzh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || nülathazh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || nülæthæzh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || nünülathazh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nünülæthæzh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || nïlathazh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || nïlæthæzh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïlathazh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïlæthæzh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || lulathazh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || lulæthæzh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || lululathazh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lululæthæzh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || lilathazh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || lilæthæzh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || lililathazh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lililæthæzh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || kolathazh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || kolæthæzh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || kokolathazh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kokolæthæzh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || kelathazh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || kelæthæzh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || kekelathazh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kekelæthæzh
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
